name: Pollo Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread crumbs and grated Parmesan cheese in a shallow dish.
2. Dip each chicken breast first in melted margarine, then coat with the breadcrumb and cheese mixture.
3. Roll up the chicken tightly, making sure to tuck in the ends and place them seam-side down in a shallow baking dish.
4. If necessary, secure the chicken with toothpicks.
5. Drizzle any remaining melted margarine over the chicken pieces.
6. Sprinkle paprika evenly over the chicken.
7. Arrange almond slivers on top as garnish.
8. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F.
